name: CommonGround - Co-Parenting
subtitle: Co-parent with clarity and peace

description.short: The complete co-parenting app for separated families. Manage schedules, communicate, and keep kids connected.
description.full:
CommonGround is the trusted co-parenting platform that helps separated families communicate effectively, manage custody schedules, and keep children connected with both parents and extended family.

KEY FEATURES:

📅 SHARED CALENDAR
• Create and manage custody schedules
• Track exchanges, activities, and appointments
• Get reminders for important events
• Request schedule changes with approval workflow

💬 SECURE MESSAGING
• Keep all co-parenting communication in one place
• Maintain a documented record of conversations
• Share photos, documents, and updates
• Reduce conflict with structured communication

📞 VIDEO CALLING
• Connect children with both parents via video
• High-quality, reliable calls powered by Daily.co
• Optional call recording for documentation
• Safe, monitored environment for kids

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 FAMILY CIRCLE
• Invite grandparents, aunts, uncles to connect
• Approve who can contact your children
• Kids can video call approved family members
• Share memories and photos with the whole family

📋 FAMILY FILE
• Store important documents securely
• Share medical records, school forms, IDs
• Access information both parents need
• Keep everything organized in one place

🔒 PRIVACY & SECURITY
• End-to-end secure messaging
• COPPA compliant for child safety
• Your data is never sold
• SOC 2 Type II certified

CommonGround is designed by family law professionals and child psychologists to reduce conflict and put children first.

Download CommonGround today and find common ground with your co-parent.

whats_new:
• Improved video calling with Daily.co integration
• New Family Circle feature for extended family
• Enhanced push notifications
• Performance improvements and bug fixes
